caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," "what people do," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the connections and flow within this system. The environment suggests an online or virtual setting, possibly a webinar or educational session, where the presenter uses visual aids to enhance understanding of the topic. The focus is on how various elements interact within a larger system, emphasizing the importance of holistic thinking in addressing societal issues.
